MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-05-2022 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF MAKSIMS ANDRUHOVICS' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES, FEES FOR COURT-APPOINTED EXPERTS, COSTS FOR CERTIFICATION UNDER OATH OF TRANSLATION OF DOCUMENTAL EVIDENCE BY QUALIFIED INTERPRETER. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
